decision_question.zh-CN: 在不同研究资源条件下，哪些 2026 前沿方向更适合作为论文切入点？
decision_question.en-US: Which 2026 frontier directions are more practical paper entry points under different research-resource profiles?

methodology.zh-CN: 切入友好度是启发式决策指标，不是录用概率。它综合资源匹配 55%、跨会议覆盖 15%、评测型切入信号 12%、样本证据量 10% 和竞争余量 8%。资源匹配同时考虑平均差距和单项短板。方向总结由 600 篇摘要与代表论文归纳，资源门槛为 1（低）到 5（高）的人工审阅标注；竞争余量仅由本样本中的相对论文密度近似。
methodology.en-US: Entry friendliness is a decision heuristic, not an acceptance probability. It combines resource fit (55%), cross-venue breadth (15%), evaluation-oriented entry signals (12%), evidence volume (10%), and competition headroom (8%). Resource fit penalizes both average gaps and a single bottleneck. Summaries are synthesized from 600 abstracts and representative papers; resource barriers are reviewed labels from 1 (low) to 5 (high), while competition headroom is only approximated from relative paper density in this sample.

zh-CN: 样本只包含 2026 年已录用或已发表论文，不能推断真实录用概率。
没有投稿总量和拒稿数据，因此“样本拥挤度”不等于真实竞争强度。
没有跨年序列，因此不能判断一个方向正在增长还是降温。
方向总结和资源门槛经过人工归纳，适合筛选候选题，不替代具体文献综述。
en-US: The sample contains only accepted or published 2026 papers, so it cannot estimate acceptance probability.
Submission totals and rejected work are unavailable; sample density is not real competitive intensity.
There is no multi-year series, so the analysis cannot establish growth or cooling momentum.
Direction synthesis and resource barriers are reviewed judgments for screening candidates, not a substitute for a focused literature review.

description.zh-CN: 单卡或少量 GPU，以公开数据和开源模型为主。
description.en-US: One or a few GPUs, relying mainly on public data and open models.

description.zh-CN: 有稳定算力、团队工程能力和常规数据处理条件。
description.en-US: Stable compute, team engineering support, and routine data access.

description.zh-CN: 算力有限，但擅长证明、优化和统计学习理论。
description.en-US: Limited compute with strong proofs, optimization, and learning theory.

description.zh-CN: 可承担大模型训练、复杂系统或机器人实验。
description.en-US: Able to run large-model training, complex systems, or robotics experiments.

title.en-US: RAG, deep retrieval, and hallucination control

summary.zh-CN: 前沿已经从“把文档检索出来”转向检索、推理、重排和可信性的一体化设计。GraphRAG 攻防、多模态检索、复杂场景评测和轻量幻觉检测都在快速形成新的问题空间。
summary.en-US: The frontier is moving beyond document lookup toward integrated retrieval, reasoning, reranking, and trustworthiness. GraphRAG security, multimodal retrieval, realistic evaluation, and lightweight hallucination detection are opening concrete problem spaces.

why_now.zh-CN: 三个会议同时出现 RAG 真实场景评测、检索推理协同、图检索攻击和幻觉检测论文，说明问题广、基线清楚、公开语料较多。
why_now.en-US: All three venues contain work on realistic RAG evaluation, retrieval-reasoning coordination, graph-retrieval attacks, and hallucination detection, with clear baselines and abundant public corpora.

zh-CN: 面向垂直领域构造高难度 RAG 评测与失败分类
做不依赖大规模训练的检索路由或重排方法
研究 GraphRAG 的逻辑攻击、数据污染与可验证防御
en-US: Build a hard domain-specific RAG benchmark and failure taxonomy
Design retrieval routing or reranking without large-scale training
Study logical attacks/data poisoning and verifiable defenses for GraphRAG

best_for.zh-CN: 低算力但能做扎实数据与评测的团队
best_for.en-US: Low-compute teams that can execute rigorous data and evaluation work

avoid.zh-CN: 只在现有 RAG 上替换一个模块、只报少量公开数据集提升，容易落入同质化。
avoid.en-US: Merely swapping one RAG module or reporting small gains on a few standard datasets is highly commoditized.

representative_papers.title: V i D o R e V3: A Comprehensive Evaluation of Retrieval Augmented Generation in Complex Real-World Scenarios
Rethinking Evaluation for LLM Hallucination Detection: A Desiderata, A New RAG -based Benchmark, New Insights
L ogic P oison: Logical Attacks on Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation

title.zh-CN: 智能体评测、工具使用与多智能体可靠性
title.en-US: Agent evaluation, tool use, and multi-agent reliability

summary.zh-CN: Agent 论文的重心正在从“能完成任务”转向长上下文、多步工具调用、协议选择、风险模拟和系统可靠性。真正有价值的工作往往是发现现有 Agent 在复杂流程中的系统性失败，而不是再造一个通用框架。
summary.en-US: Agent research is shifting from task completion demos toward long-context operation, multi-step tool use, protocol choice, risk simulation, and system reliability. Strong contributions expose systematic failures in complex workflows rather than adding another generic framework.

why_now.zh-CN: 该方向样本量大且横跨 ICLR、ICML、ACL，Benchmark、Gym、Simulator 和安全协议成为高频论文形态。
why_now.en-US: The area is large across ICLR, ICML, and ACL, with benchmarks, gyms, simulators, and safety protocols appearing repeatedly.

zh-CN: 选择一个真实工作流做多轮工具调用评测
比较多智能体协议并给出可复现实效边界
针对提示劫持、记忆污染或权限错误构造风险模拟器
en-US: Evaluate multi-turn tool use in one real workflow
Compare multi-agent protocols and establish reproducible operating boundaries
Build a risk simulator for prompt hijacking, memory poisoning, or permission failures

best_for.zh-CN: 工程能力强、能搭建可复现实验环境的团队
best_for.en-US: Teams with solid engineering and reproducible environment-building skills

avoid.zh-CN: 仅把多个 Agent 串起来展示 Demo，没有新任务、失败机制或严谨对照，很难形成论文贡献。
avoid.en-US: Chaining agents into a demo without a new task

representative_papers.title: A gency B ench: Benchmarking the Frontiers of Autonomous Agents in 1 M -Token Real-World Contexts
SciAgentGym: Benchmarking Multi-Step Scientific Tool-Use in LLM Agents
S afe A gent: Safeguarding LLM Agents via an Automated Risk Simulator

title.zh-CN: 时序基础模型与领域适配
title.en-US: Time-series foundation models and domain adaptation

summary.zh-CN: 时序研究正在吸收 LLM 的上下文学习、结构先验和生成式建模，但仍保留清晰的传统基线与公开数据集。相比通用 LLM 赛道，它更容易用中等算力做出完整、可复现的实验闭环。
summary.en-US: Time-series research is adopting in-context learning, structural priors, and generative modeling while retaining clear classical baselines and public datasets. It often supports a complete, reproducible study with moderate compute.

why_now.zh-CN: 2026 样本同时出现 LLM 时序理解、协变量上下文学习、扩散预测和结构正则化，说明方法融合仍未定型。
why_now.en-US: The 2026 sample includes LLM-based understanding, covariate-aware in-context learning, diffusion forecasting, and structural regularization, suggesting the design space is not settled.

zh-CN: 在医疗、交通、能源等单一领域做强基线下的适配研究
研究缺失值、分布漂移和跨域泛化而非只刷平均误差
把结构先验或因果依赖加入轻量时序模型
en-US: Adapt strong baselines to one domain such as health, traffic, or energy
Study missingness, shift, and cross-domain generalization rather than only average error
Add structural priors or causal dependencies to lightweight forecasting models

best_for.zh-CN: 希望用公开数据和中等算力完成完整实验的学生
best_for.en-US: Students seeking a complete public-data study with moderate compute

avoid.zh-CN: 简单把 LLM 接到时序输入、只在少量数据集上比较 MAE，创新性通常不足。
avoid.en-US: Simply attaching an LLM to time-series inputs and comparing MAE on a few datasets is usually insufficient.

representative_papers.title: LagLLM: LLM-empowered lead–lag dependency learning for spatial-temporal time series forecasting
Baguan-TS: dual in-context learning model for time series forecasting with covariates
TsLLM: Augmenting LLMs for General Time Series Understanding and Prediction

title.zh-CN: LLM 安全、越狱检测与偏好对齐
title.en-US: LLM safety, jailbreak detection, and preference alignment

summary.zh-CN: 安全对齐正在从单一拒答率转向攻击生成、网络级传播、偏好优化稳定性和自适应防护。低资源团队仍能从黑盒评测、检测器和攻击分类切入，但必须避免只堆提示词。
summary.en-US: Safety alignment is expanding from refusal rates to attack generation, network-level dynamics, preference-optimization stability, and adaptive safeguards. Low-resource teams can still enter through black-box evaluation, detectors, and attack taxonomies.

why_now.zh-CN: DPO 变体、黑盒越狱、系统提示防护和图结构检测同时出现，说明训练侧与评测侧都仍有开放问题。
why_now.en-US: DPO variants, black-box jailbreaks, system-prompt safeguards, and graph-structured detection all appear, leaving open questions on both training and evaluation sides.

zh-CN: 构造跨模型、跨语言的越狱迁移评测
做轻量黑盒检测与不确定性校准
研究多轮或多智能体环境中的安全退化
en-US: Build cross-model and cross-lingual jailbreak transfer evaluation
Develop lightweight black-box detection with uncertainty calibration
Study safety degradation in multi-turn or multi-agent settings

best_for.zh-CN: 能做严谨对抗评测、但不具备大模型预训练资源的团队
best_for.en-US: Teams capable of rigorous adversarial evaluation without pretraining-scale resources

avoid.zh-CN: 只收集一批攻击提示并报告成功率，缺少威胁模型、迁移性和防御分析时价值有限。
avoid.en-US: A prompt collection with attack success rates but no threat model

representative_papers.title: Alignment-Weighted DPO:  A principled reasoning approach to improve safety alignment
SHARP : Self-adaptive Harmful Category-aware Prompt Generation for Black-box Jailbreaking
GraphShield: Graph-Theoretic Modeling of Network-Level Dynamics for Robust Jailbreak Detection

title.zh-CN: 高效推理、Token 压缩与模型操控
title.en-US: Efficient inference, token compression, and model steering

summary.zh-CN: 高效大模型研究正在同时推进视觉 Token 剪枝、扩散语言模型解码、参数高效适配和激活操控。评价标准清楚，但方向拥挤，必须在速度、显存和质量之间给出可信的端到端收益。
summary.en-US: Efficient-model research spans visual-token pruning, diffusion-language-model decoding, parameter-efficient adaptation, and activation steering. Evaluation is clear, but the area is crowded and requires credible end-to-end speed, memory, and quality gains.

why_now.zh-CN: 三个会议都在研究推理成本，且从架构内剪枝扩展到测试时搜索、并行解码和参数子空间方法。
why_now.en-US: All three venues address inference cost, expanding from architecture-aware pruning to test-time search, parallel decoding, and parameter-subspace methods.

zh-CN: 在小型开源模型上研究可解释的 Token/层选择
建立真实硬件上的延迟—质量评测而非只报 FLOPs
针对特定任务做低秩适配或激活操控的稳定性研究
en-US: Study interpretable token/layer selection on smaller open models
Measure latency-quality tradeoffs on real hardware rather than FLOPs alone
Analyze stability of low-rank adaptation or activation steering for a specific task

best_for.zh-CN: 有模型工程经验、能做严格速度与质量测量的团队
best_for.en-US: Teams with model engineering and rigorous speed/quality measurement skills

avoid.zh-CN: 只在理想 FLOPs 上宣称加速，或只在一个模型/任务上报告微小提升，可信度不足。
avoid.en-US: Claiming speedups from idealized FLOPs or tiny gains on one model/task is not convincing.

representative_papers.title: Vista- LLM : Decoupled Query-Guided Visual Token Pruning for Efficient Long-Video Large Language Models
F ine S teer: A Unified Framework for Fine-Grained Inference-Time Steering in Large Language Models
Accelerating Diffusion Large Language Models with SlowFast Sampling: The Three Golden Principles

title.zh-CN: 多模态推理、知识融合与细粒度评测
title.en-US: Multimodal reasoning, knowledge fusion, and fine-grained evaluation

summary.zh-CN: 多模态研究正从图文问答扩展到科学欺诈、空间程序、语音文本混合和跨模态知识蒸馏。机会主要来自高难任务定义与可诊断评测，而不是简单增加模态编码器。
summary.en-US: Multimodal work is moving beyond image-text QA toward scientific forensics, spatial programs, speech-text mixtures, and cross-modal knowledge distillation. The clearest openings are hard task definitions and diagnostic evaluation.

why_now.zh-CN: 样本覆盖视觉数学、科学文档、空间推理、情感与知识图谱，任务边界快速扩张但评价协议尚不统一。
why_now.en-US: The sample spans visual math, scientific documents, spatial reasoning, emotion, and knowledge graphs, while evaluation protocols remain unsettled.

zh-CN: 选一个高价值垂直任务建立细粒度错误分类
研究模态缺失、错配和噪声下的鲁棒性
用小模型做跨模态蒸馏或数据质量研究
en-US: Build fine-grained error taxonomies for one high-value task
Study robustness to missing, mismatched, or noisy modalities
Explore cross-modal distillation or data quality with smaller models

best_for.zh-CN: 有垂直数据或评测设计能力的团队
best_for.en-US: Teams with vertical-domain data or strong evaluation design

avoid.zh-CN: 仅在通用图文数据上换融合模块，往往需要大量算力且差异不明显。
avoid.en-US: Swapping a fusion module on generic image-text data often costs substantial compute with weak differentiation.

representative_papers.title: RewardMap: Tackling Sparse Rewards in Fine-grained Visual Reasoning via Multi-Stage Reinforcement Learning
M ath F low: Enhancing the Perceptual Flow of MLLM s for Visual Mathematical Problems
Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation without Paired Data: Theoretical Foundations and Algorithms

title.zh-CN: 因果发现与基础模型结合

summary.zh-CN: 因果学习正在与 Transformer、先验数据拟合网络和结构约束预测结合。方向论文量不算最大，但要求对可识别性、潜变量和统计假设有真正贡献，适合理论与实验兼顾的团队。
summary.en-US: Causal learning is merging with transformers, prior-data fitted networks, and structurally constrained prediction. The field is not the largest, but credible work must engage with identifiability, latent variables, and statistical assumptions.

why_now.zh-CN: 基础模型开始承担因果结构学习与推断任务，同时传统可识别性问题仍未被模型规模消解。
why_now.en-US: Foundation models are beginning to perform causal structure learning and inference, while classical identifiability problems remain unresolved by scale.

zh-CN: 在明确假设下研究 Transformer 的因果结构学习机制
做潜混杂或分布变化下的可识别性与鲁棒性
构造能揭示伪因果捷径的诊断基准
en-US: Study transformer causal-structure mechanisms under explicit assumptions
Analyze identifiability and robustness under latent confounding or shift
Build diagnostics that expose spurious causal shortcuts

best_for.zh-CN: 有统计学习、因果推断或理论基础的团队

avoid.zh-CN: 仅把 Transformer 用作黑盒预测器而不讨论因果假设，容易被认为只是相关性建模。
avoid.en-US: Using a transformer as a black-box predictor without causal assumptions is likely to be treated as correlation modeling.

representative_papers.title: Foundation Models for Causal Inference via Prior-Data Fitted Networks
How Transformers Learn Causal Structures In-Context: Explainable Mechanism Meets Theoretical Guarantee
A Recursive Decomposition Framework for Causal Structure Learning in the Presence of Latent Variables

title.zh-CN: 推理强化学习与可验证奖励
title.en-US: Reasoning reinforcement learning and verifiable rewards

summary.zh-CN: RLVR 正在围绕奖励稀疏、离策略数据利用、搜索与自我校验快速演化。它是明显前沿，但已经高度拥挤，可靠训练和大规模消融通常需要较强算力。
summary.en-US: RLVR is rapidly evolving around sparse rewards, off-policy data use, search, and self-verification. It is clearly frontier work, but highly competitive and usually requires substantial compute for stable training and ablations.

why_now.zh-CN: 两个大主题合计覆盖大量论文，研究从数学推理扩展到代码、芯片、扩散模型与通用搜索。
why_now.en-US: Two large clusters cover work extending from mathematical reasoning into code, chip design, diffusion models, and general search.

zh-CN: 低资源条件下做训练动态、失败模式和数据效率分析
在可自动验证的小领域设计高质量奖励
研究搜索预算、提示和不确定性对推理的影响
en-US: Analyze training dynamics, failure modes, and data efficiency at smaller scale
Design strong verifiable rewards in a narrowly checkable domain
Study how search budgets, hints, and uncertainty affect reasoning

best_for.zh-CN: 有稳定多卡算力和强化学习经验的团队
best_for.en-US: Teams with stable multi-GPU compute and reinforcement-learning expertise

avoid.zh-CN: 直接与大实验室比模型最终分数并不现实；低资源更应研究机制、数据和评测。
avoid.en-US: Competing directly with large labs on final model scores is unrealistic; low-resource work should focus on mechanisms

representative_papers.title: Reward and Guidance through Rubrics: Promoting Exploration to Improve Multi-Domain Reasoning
Data Efficient RLVR via Off-Policy Influence Guidance
E pi C a R : Knowing What You Don’t Know Matters for Better Reasoning in LLM s

title.zh-CN: 长程智能体记忆、VLA 与具身任务
title.en-US: Long-horizon agent memory, VLA, and embodied tasks

summary.zh-CN: 长程任务把记忆更新、世界模型、子目标发现和视觉语言动作模型连接起来。方向价值高，但真实机器人、仿真环境和长序列训练让复现实验门槛明显高于纯文本 Agent。
summary.en-US: Long-horizon tasks connect memory updating, world models, subgoal discovery, and vision-language-action models. The opportunity is significant, but robotics, simulation, and long-sequence training make replication much harder than text-only agents.

why_now.zh-CN: 论文同时探索外部记忆、离视野操作、潜动作监督和目标条件强化学习，说明“长期可靠执行”仍是 Agent 的核心瓶颈。
why_now.en-US: Work on external memory, out-of-view manipulation, latent-action supervision, and goal-conditioned RL shows that reliable long-horizon execution remains a core agent bottleneck.

zh-CN: 优先在可复现仿真中研究记忆失效与恢复
做长任务评测和子目标分解而非训练超大模型
利用离线轨迹研究数据效率与错误累积
en-US: Study memory failures and recovery in reproducible simulation
Build long-task evaluation and subgoal decomposition rather than huge models
Use offline trajectories to study data efficiency and error accumulation

best_for.zh-CN: 有机器人/仿真平台和系统训练经验的团队
best_for.en-US: Teams with robotics or simulation platforms and systems-training experience

avoid.zh-CN: 没有稳定环境与复现预算时，容易把大量时间耗在系统搭建而不是研究问题上。
avoid.en-US: Without a stable environment and replication budget

representative_papers.title: Spatial Memory for Out-of-Vision Manipulation in Vision-Language-Action
Towards Practical World Model-based Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Language-Action Models
Memory, Benchmark & Robots: A Benchmark for Solving Complex Tasks with Reinforcement Learning

title.zh-CN: 生成视觉、视频与 3D 世界建模
title.en-US: Generative vision, video, and 3D world modeling

summary.zh-CN: 图像生成正在走向多主体、可编辑和自生成监督，3D 则追求单图场景生成与秒级重建。结果直观、影响力高，但训练数据、GPU 和评测成本都很重。
summary.en-US: Image generation is moving toward multi-subject control, editability, and self-generated supervision, while 3D work targets single-image worlds and rapid reconstruction. Results are compelling, but data, GPU, and evaluation costs are high.

why_now.zh-CN: 自回归图像、扩散视频、多主体生成和快速 3D 场景在同一年度集中出现，模型形态仍在竞争。
why_now.en-US: Autoregressive images, diffusion video, multi-subject generation, and fast 3D scenes all appear in the same year, with model paradigms still competing.

zh-CN: 做真实服务场景的生成质量或编辑评测
研究数据来源、版权与可追溯性
在冻结模型上做轻量控制、压缩或失败分析
en-US: Evaluate generation/editing in real service scenarios
Study data provenance, copyright, and traceability
Build lightweight control, compression, or failure analysis on frozen models

best_for.zh-CN: 有视觉算力、数据和生成模型工程经验的团队

avoid.zh-CN: 低资源团队直接训练新生成模型风险很高，应优先做评测、数据或冻结模型方法。
avoid.en-US: Training a new generator is high-risk for low-resource teams; evaluation

representative_papers.title: Data Provenance for Image Auto-Regressive Generation
S erv I mage: An Image Generation and Editing Benchmark from Real-world Commercial Imaging Services
FlashWorld: High-quality 3D Scene Generation within Seconds

title.zh-CN: 学习理论、优化与在线决策
title.en-US: Learning theory, optimization, and online decision-making

summary.zh-CN: 该方向覆盖 Bandit/MDP 遗憾界、梯度动力学、泛化条件和鲁棒优化。算力要求低，但证明门槛最高；对理论基础强的人，它反而是最“资源友好”的赛道。
summary.en-US: This area covers regret bounds for bandits/MDPs, gradient dynamics, generalization conditions, and robust optimization. Compute needs are low, but proof requirements are highest; for strong theorists it can be the most resource-efficient path.

why_now.zh-CN: 2026 论文持续把经典理论问题连接到现代嵌入、神经网络和学习增强算法，理论空间并未被大模型取代。
why_now.en-US: The 2026 papers connect classical theory to modern embeddings, neural networks, and learning-augmented algorithms; foundation models have not displaced this agenda.

zh-CN: 从一个清晰反例或现有界的缺口出发
把现代模型现象抽象为可证明的简化问题
用小规模实验验证理论预测而非追求大模型分数
en-US: Start from a clear counterexample or gap in an existing bound
Abstract a modern-model phenomenon into a provable simplified problem
Use small experiments to validate theoretical predictions rather than chase large-model scores

best_for.zh-CN: 数学基础强、算力有限的研究者
best_for.en-US: Mathematically strong researchers with limited compute

avoid.zh-CN: 如果没有可证明的新结论，只做复杂符号包装通常不能替代实质理论贡献。
avoid.en-US: Complex notation cannot substitute for a genuinely new provable result.

representative_papers.title: The Cost of Information: Phase Transitions in Contextual Bandits with Paid Observations
Necessary Conditions for Compositional Generalization of Embedding Models
Gradient Descent as a Perceptron Algorithm: Understanding Dynamics and Implicit Acceleration

title.zh-CN: 预训练表征演化与机制解释
title.en-US: Pretraining representation evolution and mechanistic interpretation

summary.zh-CN: 机制研究开始追踪概念在预训练过程中的出现、巩固和叠加，并用激活解释器连接模型内部表征与行为。方向论文量较小，但问题清晰，适合复用公开检查点做深分析。
summary.en-US: Mechanistic work is tracking how concepts emerge, consolidate, and superpose during pretraining, while activation explainers connect internal representations to behavior. The area is smaller but supports deep analysis using public checkpoints.

why_now.zh-CN: 研究从静态探针转向训练时间轴、特征几何和可干预机制，为不重新预训练模型的研究留下空间。
why_now.en-US: Work is moving from static probes to training trajectories, feature geometry, and intervention, leaving room for studies that do not pretrain models from scratch.

zh-CN: 利用公开中间检查点追踪一个能力或偏差的形成
比较探针、稀疏特征与干预结论的一致性
把机制指标与下游失效或安全现象连接
en-US: Trace the formation of one capability or bias through public checkpoints
Compare probes, sparse features, and intervention conclusions
Connect mechanism metrics to downstream failures or safety behavior

best_for.zh-CN: 擅长分析、能访问公开检查点但算力中等的团队
best_for.en-US: Analysis-oriented teams with public checkpoints and moderate compute

avoid.zh-CN: 仅展示相关性热图、不做干预或行为验证，难以支持机制结论。
avoid.en-US: Correlation heatmaps without intervention or behavioral validation do not establish mechanisms.

representative_papers.title: Evolution of Concepts in Language Model Pre-Training
Crosscoding Through Time: Tracking Emergence & Consolidation Of Linguistic Representations Throughout LLM Pretraining
Activation Oracles: Training and Evaluating LLMs as General-Purpose Activation Explainers

title.zh-CN: 人机共创、叙事与可视化智能体
title.en-US: Human-AI creation, narrative, and visualization agents

summary.zh-CN: 该方向关注复杂叙事、交互生成和可视化编码 Agent，论文数量较少但任务新、用户价值明确。切入点通常不是更大的模型，而是任务设计、人类评价和可控交互。
summary.en-US: This smaller direction covers complex narratives, interactive generation, and visualization-coding agents. The opportunity is less about larger models and more about task design, human evaluation, and controllable interaction.

why_now.zh-CN: 从故事一致性到交互动作和可视化编程，生成系统开始接受更接近真实创作流程的评价。
why_now.en-US: From story coherence to interaction and visualization programming, generative systems are being evaluated against more realistic creative workflows.

zh-CN: 为一个创作流程定义可重复的人机评价协议
研究多轮修订、可控性和一致性而非单次生成
建立小而高质量的专家标注数据
en-US: Define a repeatable human-AI evaluation protocol for one creative workflow
Study iterative revision, control, and coherence rather than one-shot generation
Build a small high-quality expert-annotated dataset

best_for.zh-CN: 有 HCI、可视化或特定创作领域资源的团队

avoid.zh-CN: 仅做主观案例展示、没有用户研究或可复现评价，会削弱论文说服力。
avoid.en-US: Subjective demos without user studies or reproducible evaluation are weak evidence.

representative_papers.title: PlotCraft: Pushing the Limits of LLMs for Complex and Interactive Data Visualization
VisCoder2: Building Multi-Language Visualization Coding Agents
Evaluating Visual Narrative Coherence in Story Visualization via Diversified Storylines
